libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: For nativeTest/native-image runs of io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1, set runtime system properties -Dsun.misc.unsafe.memory.access=allow and -Dio.netty.tryReflectionSetAccessible=true. Tests should use an in-process Vert.x HttpServer bound to 127.0.0.1 for request/response, form, multipart, redirect, cookie/session, and cache coverage rather than external network services.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #7998 [Automation] native-image run fails for io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: vertx-web-client 5.0.1 resolves Vert.x Core 5.0.1 and Netty 4.2.2.Final; omitting the unsafe-access properties may reproduce the native-image runtime failure on JDK 25.
OAuth2WebClient depends on the optional io.vertx:vertx-auth-oauth2 module; avoid OAuth2-specific coverage unless intentionally adding that optional dependency.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: No extra Maven dependency or Docker service is needed for meaningful Vert.x Web Client coverage, but native runs for 5.0.1 inherit the same Netty 4.2/JDK 25 unsafe-access requirement already handled for 5.0.0.
